ques: Find a one-way business class flight from Buenos Aires to Amsterdam on July 10, 2026, and provide the details of the flight with the shortest duration.
answer: The shortest-duration one-way Business class flight from Buenos Aires to Amsterdam on July 10, 2026 is KLM flight KL702 (nonstop): departs Ezeiza International Airport (EZE) at 3:05 PM on Fri, Jul 10, arrives Amsterdam Schiphol (AMS) at 9:10 AM on Sat, Jul 11 (+1), total duration 13 hr 5 min, Boeing 777, Business Class, €4,002.
